description_long: This is a vintage-style yellow hair dryer with a cylindrical black nozzle and a rounded main body. The main body features a prominent circular air intake grill with concentric rings and a central label. The handle is straight and extends downward, with a visible power cord emerging from its base. A red button or switch is located on the side of the handle, providing user control. The nozzle is metallic and slightly wider than the handle, with a perforated front for airflow, and the overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for everyday use.
description: A yellow, vintage hair dryer with a black cylindrical nozzle, circular air intake grill, and a straight handle with a visible power cord and side button.
description_view_0: Side view showing the circular air intake grill, handle, and the full length of the black nozzle.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded back of the main body and the alignment of the handle and nozzle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the air intake grill, handle, and nozzle, with the power cord visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the perforated black nozzle opening and the alignment of the handle beneath it.
attribute_nozzle_design: The nozzle is cylindrical, metallic, and narrow, with a perforated front for airflow. It appears to be an integrated concentrator style, not removable, and is designed to focus the air stream.
attribute_air_intake_grill_pattern: The air intake grill features concentric circular rings with radial supports, forming a circular pattern around a central label.
attribute_handle_orientation: The handle is perpendicular to the main body, extending straight downward from the base.
